name: MY LUSCIOUSNESS IS GOOOOOOOOOOONE
description:
"I wanna bring up a toast, welcome my sisters and bros, but some disrespectful prick stole all my precious coupons. My lusciousness is now gone, I'll break your every bone. Chase you to MD Extreme. Don't click away you bristly fu- – 'If you see me in the LimBus' made by weno

I wanted to make this bot to thank to those who have did their best to assist me in defeating Ricardo, The Big Brother of the Middle.
creator: Crk Chatter
